texto: That's why I wanted to be part of this AIDS Project Los Angeles party. We help raise funds for those who are having a tough time with some very basic necessities, like shelter, food, and medical care.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brande Roderick: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “That's why I wanted to be part of this AIDS Project Los Angeles party. We help raise funds for th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, time, food pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de food e help.
